beats.narration: A gamma camera has no off switch. The source decays every second, so your whole day starts before the first shot.

payload.title: THE CAMERA NEVER TURNS OFF
payload.sub: No off switch. So the day starts with an inspection.

beats.narration: Walk the chain, hands on, against the manufacturer's instructions. One worn link can leave a source stuck outside its shield, unseen.

chips.s: Source locks positively; cannot exit the rear
Cable and guide tube seat fully and latch
Smooth travel; no kinks or broken strands

beats.narration: A stuck source and a locked one feel identical. Before you connect and after every shot, the meter is the only honest answer.

payload.sub: Confirm shielded with a calibrated meter — never by looks, never by feel.

beats.narration: Even locked, the device leaks. Federal limits cap it: no more than two hundred millirem per hour at the surface, fifty at one meter.

tiles.s: Worst leakage of a good camera

beats.narration: Over a limit, sticky, frayed, or missing a seal — the camera comes out of service. You find the defect and tag it, never field-repair it.

payload.sub: Maintenance is qualified-only — and a clean record is your legal proof.
